Paddy Johnson Brooklyn blog City reports that Chelsea Museum cancelled November opening Aesthetics Terror chief curator resigned protest.
Museum president Dorothea Keeser reportedly felt exhibition which include artists like Jenny Holzer, Harun Farocki, Martha Rosler Chapman brothers glorified terrorism showed disrespect victims," according Josh Azzarella, show's artists.
chief curator Manon Slome has, according Johnson, left over cancellation.
museum deleted mention exhibition, which Nov. though Jan. cached version (with title Dialectics Terror) still available.
UPDATE Johnson interviews Keeser offers note from former chief curator Manon Slome.
Terror itself, image making machine.
very point terror spectacle that plays endlessly media.
9/11, thousands have died, billions people watched attack falling towers endlessly until those images were etched into global psyche.
While terrorism representations have been widely discussed ever since 9/11, very these contemplations have tackled issue specific formal qualities pictorial strategies terrorism.
exhibition Dialectics Terror tries exactly that; namely, investigates certain visual characteristics spectacle Terror echoes contemporary art.
exhibition employs distinction made artist Roee Rosen principle between representations underground terrorism, produced terrorist groups, images State Terror this between figuration abstraction.
representational apparatus State Terror, says Rosen, based blurring erasure central figures, exchanging abstraction: Smart Bombs' aerial views bombardments, example, blocking visibility grids satellite type images that obscure rather than illuminate.
other end, representations underground terrorism strive central, powerful figure symbol portrait suicide bomber, collapsing skyscrapers icon bearded Laden with golden gown triangular composition "this icon religious sense: human, semi-divine person whose very appearance defies divide life death", Rosen claims.
What happens when image terrorism moves from newspaper news networks, gallery museum?
What causes shift from image having "documentary" relevance becoming aesthetic object circulating system?
artists navigate these boundaries, either through direct translation through appropriation, does violence retain power inspire fear dread, does this contextual transposition fetishize violence, stripping meaning through aestheticization?
Dialectics Terror explores traumas daily news with question nature purport this integration.
Dialectics Terror maps relationship between abstraction technology; color violence, pixilated images sovereignty, saturation contour, authenticity resolution.
Much work exhibition deals less with direct depiction violence terror than with media representations perceptions filtered through media itself corporate entity whose failure bare species evil that being enacted under rubric terror also very much point.
Dialectics Terror strives suggest emergence artistic sensibility which been informed imagery politics terrorism current common culture they have been formulated conveyed through popular media.
Artworks might imitate mirror this media rhetoric, identify mechanisms viewer, critique push back protest against
Through writings contemporary scholars from around world, exhibition catalogue proposes further investigation into image production machine terror.
Co-curator Manon Slome implements exhibition's formalistic reading terror imagery through exhibited works.
Co-curator Joshua Simon presents close reading suicide bombers videos case study terror image making.

German critic Boris Groys reads Ghraib photos relation western traditions humiliation survival scholar Eric Stryker suggests historical overview relations terror from French revolution present day.
fully illustrated catalogue will produced exhibition with texts Manon Slome, Joshua Simon, Sven Lutticken, Eric Stryker.
